title: Fluffy Garlic Mexican Stir-fry
description: A light rum-flavored, whole30-friendly dish featuring fluffy garlic and traditional Yucatecan flavors for a post-workout meal.

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: minced for a milder flavor, or 2 minced + 2 smashed whole for stronger garlic taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic or smashed whole garlic cloves and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add onion and sauté for another minute until softened.
Add chicken pieces to the skillet. Cook for 5-7 minutes on each side, browning nicely.
If using light rum, add it now and stir to coat the chicken evenly. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for about 2 minutes or until the flavors meld together.
Remove from heat and allow the dish to rest for a few minutes before serving with sliced avocado on top and fresh cilantro leaves.
